title: A Family Found an Alligator in Their Pool
script: A family woke up to find an eleven-foot alligator floating in their backyard swimming pool. It had climbed the fence overnight, slid into the water, and made itself right at home, staring back at them through the glass door. Gators do this more than people think; a pool looks exactly like the warm, still water they love, and they'll travel surprising distances on land to find one. Trappers had to lasso it and tape its jaws shut before hauling it out, and it took four grown men to move it. The scariest part was realizing it had been in there all night. So how do you even get one out safely?
